Vendored offline canary subset from `mattcurrie/mealybug-tearoom-tests`.

- Source repo: `https://github.com/mattcurrie/mealybug-tearoom-tests`
- Source revision: `70e88fb90b59d19dfbb9c3ac36c64105202bb1f4`
- License: MIT

This directory intentionally vendors only the tiny Wave B.5 DMG canary subset used by
the live SoC-frame regression path:

- `m3_scx_low_3_bits.gb`
- `m3_scx_high_5_bits.gb`
- `m3_window_timing.gb`
- `m2_win_en_toggle.gb`
- `m3_bgp_change.gb`
